_meta.description: ICD-10-AM codes excluded from Diagnosis Complexity Level (DCL) per AR-DRG V11.0 standards.

principles: Pre-existing conditions without incremental resource use

unconditional_exclusions.description: Codes always excluded from DCL regardless of other diagnoses.

codes.exclusion_reason: Reflects background state, not incremental resource use.
Common incidental finding without active treatment.
Infection control flag, not clinical complexity driver.

codes.description: Procedure not carried out because of contraindication

conditional_exclusions.description: Excluded only when related definitive diagnosis is present.

rules.reason: Integral to COPD or Heart Failure
